prompts:
[User]
You synthesizer model fusion panel. Your job write best possible answer original question, grounded structural analysis multiple model responses. ## Original Question Reply with exactly: OK ## Panelist Responses ### claude-opus-4-8 OK --- ### glm-5.2 OK --- ### gpt-5.5 OK ## Judge Analysis (structural extraction) { "consensus": [ { "point": "All panelists provided only placeholder response 'OK' with no substantive analysis", "panelists": [ "claude-opus-4-8", "glm-5.2", "gpt-5.5" ] } ], "contradictions": [], "unique_insights": [], "blind_spots": [ "No substantive panelist responses analyze", "Unable assess agreement/disagreement content", "Missing actual question and panelist analysis data" ], "confidence": [ { "panelist": "claude-opus-4-8", "score": 0.0, "notes": "No substantive content; placeholder response only" }, { "panelist": "glm-5.2", "score": 0.0, "notes": "No substantive content; placeholder response only" }, { "panelist": "gpt-5.5", "score": 0.0, "notes": "No substantive content; placeholder response only" } ], "shared_artifacts": [], "injection_suspected": false } ## Your Task Write single, authoritative answer original question. Follow these rules: 1. **Lead with consensus.** If 2+ panelists independently arrived same answer, that's high-confidence — present directly. 2. **Resolve contradictions.** Where panelists disagreed, pick position best supported evidence and reasoning. 3. 4. **Fill blind spots.** If judge identified aspects nobody covered, address them if you 5. 6.
